own_review_points: SemanticQueryBuilder safe-mode gate should also catch function('column'/'sql', ...) by function name, not just functionTemplate==null (human ref, line ~4609)
Property naming: hibernate.query.safe_mode_enabled vs the hibernate.query.hql.<x>_enabled convention (plausible but unverifiable from bundle)
whats-new.adoc: trailing blank lines before closing ---- delimiter
notes: v8 built its ENTIRE review on a false premise: 'the SafeMode feature/implementation/tests do not exist, this is a doc-only PR.' But the changed-file header explicitly lists the 10 implementation files (SemanticQueryBuilder.java, QuerySettings.java, SqmCreationOptions.java, HqlSafeModeTest.java, etc.) — they are simply not included in this bundle's diff body. Per rubric, asserting 'X is missing' when X is in the changed-file list is a fabrication. P1 (no SafeMode class anywhere), P2 (no tests exist — HqlSafeModeTest.java IS listed), P3 (only 1 file changed, impl absent), P5/P6 (no validation gate in visitJpaNonstandardFunction/visitColumnFunction — the human ref proves the safe-mode check exists at 4609), P7 (Dialect.java not even in changed-file list) are all fabrications/wrong (6). The human's actual point (extend the gate to cover function('column')) was missed. P4 naming nit and P8 formatting and P9 FunctionContributor-praise are trivial. A confidently-wrong review.
